generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#

instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensing component for crane state data in the physical system",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance PhysicalCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical crane structure and dedicated controller in the lab"
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin system for the gantry crane"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program that captures crane state data and publishes via MQTT"
]

instance HistoricalDataRetrievalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from historical data retrieval"
]

instance SystemStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from real-time visualization of system states"
]

instance MotionPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from motion planning for optimal control"
]

instance ControlOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from control optimization for the gantry crane"
]

instance SynchronizationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from continuous validation of synchronization"
]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from C4 architecture visualization"
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for storage and retrieval of operational data",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataRetrievalInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for monitoring system states in real-time",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for motion planning and optimization of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionPlanningInsight, ControlOptimizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for ensuring synchronization between physical and digital models",
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationValidationInsight
]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for visualizing the digital twin architecture using C4 model",
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureVisualizationInsight
]

instance C4VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for visualizing the C4 architecture model",
    DTDFVocab:enables ArchitectureVisualizationService
]

instance LoggingApplicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for historical data logging to TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time visualization of crane states",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for motion planning and optimization",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for synchronization between physical and digital models",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance C4ArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 model for software architecture visualization of the digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4VisualizationEnabler
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data of the gantry crane system",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler, RealTimeVisualizationEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance LabGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory environment for the lab-scale gantry crane system",
    base:contains PhysicalCraneSystem, DigitalTwinSystem, PhysicalCraneInterface, CraneStateSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Movement trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are processed by the Control Application and sent via MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which executes them on the physical hardware. Command formats, validation, authentication, and conflict resolution mechanisms are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs an ad-hoc architecture utilizing containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment, with components including InfluxDB for time-series data storage, ActiveMQ as a message broker, and Microsoft Azure tools for cloud services. The architecture is visualized using the C4 Model for context and container diagrams, focusing on integration of physical sensors, data pipelines, and digital twin models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between digital twin services (Control Application, Logging Application, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, Dashboard) occurs via MQTT protocol through an MQTT Broker, forming a publish-subscribe network topology. Bandwidth, latency, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is achieved through Microsoft Azure cloud services for data processing and storage, AutomationML for model interoperability, and ActiveMQ message broker for data exchange between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar adheres to AutomationML standards for digital twin modeling. The Lab Scale Gantry Crane applies the C4 Model for architecture description, a standardized approach for software architecture visualization. However, broader interoperability standards or certification requirements are not specified."
]
